title: Small Totem Overlay
description: This resource pack makes the default Totem overlay smaller, significantly increasing visibility upon a Totem pop.
body:
_Ever popped your Totem during a P.V.P match/battle, and your view was obstructed by the **BIG** Totem overlay? Well you came to the right place, as this pack fixes the obstruction!_

**Resource Pack Description**

**Small Totem Overlay** is a Minecraft resource pack, that changes the size of the original Totem overlay, to a smaller one, ensuring that the Totem overlay isn't covering most of your view upon using a Totem.

For a visual of this Resource pack, please visit this pack's **[Gallery Tab](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-overlay/gallery)**.

<hr>

**Donation**

If you want to support me, then please consider to click the link on this page.
